creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text:
(In reply to Eirik Oeverby from comment #6)
No argument against your empirical experience. Also, I would pretty much expect that most payloads will work fine. Still I thought it would be useful to know where these dependencies are used, so that an informed decision can be made. Just "they're not needed" is a tad thin :)
